---
title: "First steps"
format: html
---

The package can be installed from GitHub using `pak`.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
pak::pak("dtereshch/paneldesc")
```

After that, you can import it in the usual way.

```{r}
library(paneldesc)
```

All functions of the package have detailed documentation with examples.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
?add_means
?decompose_factor
?decompose_numeric
?describe_balance
?describe_dimensions
?describe_incomplete
?describe_patterns
?describe_periods
?make_balanced
?make_demeaned
?make_long
?make_panel
?make_wide
?plot_demeaned
?plot_heterogeneity
?plot_missing
?plot_patterns
?plot_periods
?production
?summarize_missing
?summarize_numeric
?summarize_transition
```
